question: How do I get a free quote?
answer: Getting a quote is simple. Fill out our free quote form on this website, or call us directly at (647) 560-1095. After you reach out, one of our project managers will contact you within 24–48 hours to schedule a free in-home consultation. During the visit — which typically takes 30–60 minutes — we assess your space, discuss your goals, review your options, and take measurements. We then prepare a detailed, fixed-price written quote within a few business days. There is no obligation and no pressure.
